mapper.select:
SELECT id, tag_number, instrument_name, device_name, device, installation_location, specification_model, measurement_range, quantity, manufacturer, unit_special_code, status, dv_type FROM unit_special_instruments
AND tag_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.tagNumber}, '%')
AND instrument_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.instrumentName}, '%')
AND status = #{queryParams.status}

SELECT tag_number, instrument_name, device_name, device, installation_location, specification_model, measurement_range, quantity, manufacturer, unit_special_code, status, dv_type FROM unit_special_instruments
AND tag_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagNumber}, '%')
AND instrument_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{instrumentName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
